title: Brotein product roadmap — Anabolic Leadership Board, Jun 2025
html:
TL;DR

  • The Brotein roadmap snapshot Jun 28 2025 — six months after 2024 12 28 ideas's "BroMenu" seed, two months before 2025 08 21 austin move.
  • Coming-soon features:
    • AI Anabolic Analysis — works on menu, nutrition label, any food item.
    • Foreign-language compatibility for travel.
    • Menu ranking + anabolic suggestion.
    • Anabolic Food Ranking explore database.
    • Protein-goal streak.
  • Closing positioning line: "The gap between macro tracking and degen eating."

Key positioning

"The gap between macro tracking and degen eating."

Why it matters in the graph

  • Cleanest single-line value-prop for brotein in the corpus. The whole product reduced to one frame: degen eaters who want macros without sacrificing degen-eating.
  • The Anabolic Leadership Board (gamification + leaderboard) confirms the TikTok+leaderboard+share marketing thesis from the Memory.md / 2026 04 26 sweep notes.
  • Foreign-language compatibility — interesting product call from someone who just spent 3 months in Shanghai eating menus he couldn't read. The product is personal pain → product.
  • Pairs with 2024 12 28 ideas (the BroMenu seed) and 2025 05 30 todos (Brotein-on-app-store deadline) — together a 12-month product-evolution arc.

Open questions

  • Did Anabolic Leadership Board actually ship?
  • Foreign-language compatibility — implemented, or still aspirational?
  • The anabolic-food-ranking database — same data spine as the fast food nutrition dataset concept?

Wikilinks

brotein · anabolic scoring · fast food nutrition dataset · 2024 12 28 ideas · 2025 05 30 todos · Memory · restaurant menu scraping
